titles.text: Simple 2000 Series Vol. 1: The Table Board

descriptions.text: Simple 2000 Series Vol.001 - The Table Board that features different games: Mahjong, Igo, Go, Reversi, Hanafuda, card games, etc. The game also features another mode in which the player controls the boy that have to rescue the girl from a fantasy kindgom playing all the different games through the game (mahjongs, igo, go, reversi, hanafudas, etc) in the different places of that kingdom.
